author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev. Peer-2-Peer Engineer and Researcher @protocollabs: @mineFilecoin @libp2p @ipld | P2P http://M.Sc. Lecturer at @istecnico. Made @lxjs & @startupscholars
author.name: David Dias

content.text:
Ever wondered how to use go-ipfs as a library from #golang code? Wonder no more! Check out the fresh out of the oven new Tutorial on how to use go-ipfs as a Library

https://github.com/ipfs/go-ipfs/tree/master/docs/examples/go-ipfs-as-a-library

#IPFS
